sentences.target: Ich trage den Termin in den Kalender ein.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈtʁaːɡə deːn tɛʁˈmiːn ɪn deːn kaˈlɛndɐ aɪn/

translations.de: Ich trage den Termin in den Kalender ein.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈtʁaːɡə deːn tɛʁˈmiːn ɪn deːn kaˈlɛndɐ aɪn/
translations.en: I enter the appointment in the calendar.
translations.es: Apunto la cita en el calendario.
translations.fr: Je note le rendez-vous dans le calendrier.
translations.yue: 我喺日曆上寫低個約會。
translations.pt: Eu anoto o compromisso no calendário.
translations.vi: Tôi ghi cuộc hẹn vào lịch.
translations.nl: Ik zet de afspraak in de agenda.
translations.hi: मैं अपॉइंटमेंट कैलेंडर में लिखता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg skriver inn avtalen i kalenderen.
translations.id: Saya mencatat janji temu di kalender.
translations.sv: Jag skriver in mötet i kalendern.
translations.ja: 私は予定をカレンダーに書き込む。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the finite verb.
Finite verb (1st sg. pres.); here forms a separable verb with the particle ‘ein’ meaning ‘to enter/record’. Selects a direct object (‘den Termin’) and a directional PP (‘in den Kalender’).
Definite article, accusative masculine singular, determiner of ‘Termin’ (direct object).
Common noun; direct object (accusative) of the verb.
Preposition governing accusative here (direction); heads the PP expressing goal (‘in den Kalender’).
Definite article, accusative masculine singular, determiner of ‘Kalender’ within the PP.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘in’ (goal of motion).
Separable verbal particle completing ‘trage’ to form ‘eintragen’ (‘to enter/record’).

sentences.target: Der Kalender hängt neben der Tür.

translations.de: Der Kalender hängt neben der Tür.
translations.en: The calendar hangs next to the door.
translations.es: El calendario cuelga al lado de la puerta.
translations.fr: Le calendrier est accroché à côté de la porte.
translations.it: Il calendario è appeso accanto alla porta.
translations.pt: O calendário está pendurado ao lado da porta.
translations.nl: De kalender hangt naast de deur.
translations.hu: A naptár az ajtó mellett lóg.
translations.hi: कैलेंडर दरवाज़े के पास टंगा है.
translations.el: Το ημερολόγιο κρέμεται δίπλα στην πόρτα.
translations.nb: Kalenderen henger ved siden av døra.
translations.da: Kalenderen hænger ved siden af døren.
translations.ja: カレンダーはドアの横に掛かっている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular, determiner of the subject ‘Kalender’.
Common noun; nominative subject of ‘hängt’.
Finite main verb (3rd sg. pres.); predicate of the clause.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a locative PP.
Definite article, dative feminine singular, determiner of ‘Tür’ within the PP.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘neben’ (locative complement).

translations.en: My doctor’s appointment is in the calendar.
translations.es: Mi cita con el médico está en el calendario.
translations.fr: Mon rendez-vous chez le médecin est noté dans le calendrier.
translations.it: Il mio appuntamento dal dottore è segnato sul calendario.
translations.ko: 내 병원 예약이 달력에 적혀 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的看医生的预约记在日历上。
translations.yue: 我睇醫生嘅預約喺日曆上寫低咗。
translations.ru: Мой прием у врача записан в календаре.
translations.pt: Minha consulta médica está anotada no calendário.
translations.vi: Cuộc hẹn bác sĩ của tôi có trong lịch.
translations.ar: موعدي مع الطبيب مسجل في التقويم.
translations.nl: Mijn doktersafspraak staat in de agenda.
translations.uk: Мій візит до лікаря записаний у календарі.
translations.hu: Az orvosi időpontom fel van írva a naptárban.
translations.hi: डॉक्टर के पास जाने का समय कैलेंडर में लिखा है.
translations.pl: W kalendarzu mam wpisaną wizytę u lekarza.
translations.el: Το ραντεβού μου με τον γιατρό είναι σημειωμένο στο ημερολόγιο.
translations.id: Janji temu dokter saya tercatat di kalender.
translations.ro: Programarea mea la medic este trecută în calendar.
translations.cs: V kalendáři mám zapsanou návštěvu u lékaře.
translations.ja: 私の病院の予約はカレンダーに書いてある。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of ‘in’ + ‘dem’; preposition with dative introducing a locative PP.
Common noun; dative object of ‘im’ within the PP.
Finite main verb (3rd sg. pres.); here in the sense ‘is written/listed’; the subject follows (‘mein Arzttermin’).
Possessive determiner, nominative singular, modifies ‘Arzttermin’.
Compound noun; nominative subject of ‘steht’.

sentences.target: Du siehst auf dem Handy im Kalender nach.
sentences.reading: /duː ziːst aʊf deːm ˈhɛndi ɪm kaˈlɛndɐ naːx/

translations.de: Du siehst auf dem Handy im Kalender nach.
translations.ipa: /duː ziːst aʊf deːm ˈhɛndi ɪm kaˈlɛndɐ naːx/
translations.en: You check the calendar on your phone.
translations.es: Revisas el calendario en el teléfono.
translations.fr: Tu regardes le calendrier sur ton téléphone.
translations.pt: Você confere o calendário no celular.
translations.he: אתה בודק את לוח השנה בטלפון.
translations.vi: Bạn xem lịch trên điện thoại.
translations.nl: Je kijkt in de agenda op je telefoon.
translations.hi: तुम फोन पर कैलेंडर देखते हो.
translations.el: Ελέγχεις το ημερολόγιο στο κινητό σου.
translations.ja: スマホでカレンダーを確認する。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the finite verb.
Finite verb (2nd sg. pres.); here part of the separable verb ‘nachsehen’ meaning ‘to check/look up’.
Preposition; governs dative here, introducing a locative PP (‘auf dem Handy’).
Definite article, dative neuter singular, determiner of ‘Handy’ within the PP.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘auf’ (locative complement).
Contraction of ‘in’ + ‘dem’; preposition with dative introducing another locative PP (‘im Kalender’).
Common noun; dative object of ‘im’ within the PP.
Separable verbal particle completing ‘siehst’ to form ‘nachsehen’ (‘to check/look up’).

jp: Ich trage den Termin in den Kalender ein.
Der Kalender hängt neben der Tür.
Du siehst auf dem Handy im Kalender nach.
fu: /ɪç ˈtʁaːɡə deːn tɛʁˈmiːn ɪn deːn kaˈlɛndɐ aɪn/
/duː ziːst aʊf deːm ˈhɛndi ɪm kaˈlɛndɐ naːx/
de: Ich trage den Termin in den Kalender ein.
Der Kalender hängt neben der Tür.
Du siehst auf dem Handy im Kalender nach.
ipa: /ɪç ˈtʁaːɡə deːn tɛʁˈmiːn ɪn deːn kaˈlɛndɐ aɪn/
/duː ziːst aʊf deːm ˈhɛndi ɪm kaˈlɛndɐ naːx/
en: I enter the appointment in the calendar.
The calendar hangs next to the door.
My doctor’s appointment is in the calendar.
You check the calendar on your phone.

El calendario cuelga al lado de la puerta.
Mi cita con el médico está en el calendario.
Revisas el calendario en el teléfono.

Le calendrier est accroché à côté de la porte.
Mon rendez-vous chez le médecin est noté dans le calendrier.
Tu regardes le calendrier sur ton téléphone.

Il mio appuntamento dal dottore è segnato sul calendario.

डॉक्टर के पास जाने का समय कैलेंडर में लिखा है.
तुम फोन पर कैलेंडर देखते हो.
